name: Apple Cake (Kathy Cooks)
recipeIngredient: 1 Apple, peeled, cored and sliced about 1/8 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Melt the first two ingredients together in a 9-inch square cake pan by placing the pan with the ingredients into the oven as it is preheating.
3. While the ingredients are melting, mix the next four ingredients together and then stir them into the melted butter and honey. Arrange apple slices in the syrup to cover the bottom of the cake pan attractively. (You may need more than one apple if you use a small one.)
4. Fill a 1-cup measuring cup with pitted dates but do not pack the dates into the cup. Add water, then pour both dates and water into a blender. Add an additional 1/2 cup of water into the blender. Blend until it forms a smooth, thick paste.
5. Add the remaining 1/4 cup butter or margarine to the blender and blend until completely whipped in.
6. Pour the blender mixture into a mixing bowl and add the last five dry ingredients. Mix just long enough to thoroughly combine all the dry ingredients.
7. Pour this batter over the apple slices and spread evenly in the cake pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 to 40 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the middle of the cake comes out clean. When done, remove from oven and immediately turn the cake pan upside down to empty onto a serving platter.
